ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting preference of the player */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing preference of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Rookie year of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's team */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement (WAR) metric */,
  "yr_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Outfielder, Pitcher) */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., Field, Pitch) */,
  "position_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the position (e.g., OF, P) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the league was founded */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "batting_avg" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount for the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Multi-year, One-year) */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "incentives" REAL /* Incentives for the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Coach, Scout) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Multi-year, One-year) */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-position entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position the player can play */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Whether the position is the player's primary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_name FOREIGN KEY ("position_name") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's tenure in the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's tenure in the position */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_histories_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_histories_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_histories_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "total_salary_budget" REAL /* Total salary budget for the season */,
  "spent_salary" REAL /* Amount of salary already spent */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining salary budget */,
  "luxury_tax_threshold" REAL /* Luxury tax threshold for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_finances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
